title: Multiples: What is the impact of increasing the payout ratio on...
summary: Evaluate the P/E ratio as a valuation metric comparing market price to earnings per share.
prompt: What is the impact of increasing the payout ratio on the P/E ratio, assuming constant growth?

options.text: Increasing the payout ratio typically leads to a decrease in retained earnings

solution: Increasing the payout ratio typically leads to a decrease in retained earnings and growth, which in turn decreases the growth rate (g) in the P/E ratio formula, leading to a lower P/E ratio.
